notes: v0.15.9 — COSMETICS page rebuilt as Split Focus. LEFT: live preview + 4-chip loadout summary (SHIP/PROJECTILE/TRAIL/SHIELD names for the active class). RIGHT: 4 tabs + scrollable pretty skin buttons (64px art swatch, name, flavor line, status pill, price). PREMIUM SURGE skins get a gold ribbon; PULSE skins say PULSE SHOP, never 'premium'. Hover lifts the border to cyan. Sort: equipped → owned → locked, premium pinned last. Windows only.
